narrative_text: The boy runs after the wagon. The dog runs beside him, barking loudly. The wagon swerves past a man carrying boxes and nearly hits a flower stand. The grandmother calls after them from the porch.
scene_description: The journey continues to a small, weathered wooden bridge crossing a sparkling blue stream. The boy and his dog stop abruptly as they encounter a large, green frog sitting right in the center of the path. Dappled sunlight filters through the leafy canopy above, casting dancing patterns on the water and the grassy riverbank.

properties.distinctive_features: thick brown curly hair and wide eyes

title: The Chase
